---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: type/feature
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case. What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other ways to approach this?

## Additional Context

Any relevant screenshots, links, or other context.
